title: hieracium murorum subsp. divaricans
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. divaricans, also known as the wall hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. divaricans include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed effectively.
